ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the weather station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance check */,
  "status" TEXT /* Operational status of the weather station (e.g., active, inactive, under maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type (e.g., wind speed, temperature) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the data type */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station that collected the data */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date the data was collected */,
  "data_value" REAL /* Value of the data collected */,
  "time_of_collection" TEXT /* Time of day when the data was collected */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Specific sensor or instrument used to collect the data */,
  "quality_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating the quality of the data (e.g., 0 for good, 1 for suspect, 2 for bad) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collections_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collections_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wind_speed_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wind speed data point */,
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data collection that the wind speed data belongs to */,
  "mean" REAL /* Mean wind speed */,
  "minimum" REAL /* Minimum wind speed */,
  "maximum" REAL /* Maximum wind speed */,
  "variance" REAL /* Variance of wind speed */,
  "std_error_mean" REAL /* Standard error of the mean wind speed */,
  "num_points" INTEGER /* Number of data points */,
  "quality_flag" INTEGER /* Quality flag */,
  "time_interval" TEXT /* Time interval over which the data was collected */,
  "sample_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which data points were sampled */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Specific sensor or instrument used to collect the data */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Exact timestamp for the data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wind_speed_data_collection_id FOREIGN KEY ("collection_id") REFERENCES data_collections ("collection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "temperature_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each temperature data point */,
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data collection that the temperature data belongs to */,
  "mean" REAL /* Mean temperature */,
  "minimum" REAL /* Minimum temperature */,
  "maximum" REAL /* Maximum temperature */,
  "variance" REAL /* Variance of temperature */,
  "std_error_mean" REAL /* Standard error of the mean temperature */,
  "num_points" INTEGER /* Number of data points */,
  "quality_flag" INTEGER /* Quality flag */,
  "time_interval" TEXT /* Time interval over which the data was collected */,
  "sample_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which data points were sampled */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Specific sensor or instrument used to collect the data */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Exact timestamp for the data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_temperature_data_collection_id FOREIGN KEY ("collection_id") REFERENCES data_collections ("collection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* User's password (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User's account status (e.g., active, suspended, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data collection being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_collection_id FOREIGN KEY ("collection_id") REFERENCES data_collections ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the request */,
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data collection being requested */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date when the request was made */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report being requested (e.g., hourly, daily, monthly) */,
  "request_status" TEXT /* Status of the data request (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "request_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the data request */,
  "result_url" TEXT /* URL where the requested data can be accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_requests_collection_id FOREIGN KEY ("collection_id") REFERENCES data_collections ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
